system.description:
A Shamanic Sorcerer is a Magical Adept who follows the Shamanic tradition and specialises entirely in Sorcery. They can cast spells but cannot summon Nature Spirits. They must choose a Totem and receive their Totem's bonuses and penalties for spellcasting where applicable.

Magical Adepts have no access to astral space whatsoever — neither astral perception nor astral projection.

SR2E p.163
